heading: Starts With Example
body:
Each query includes a:

- [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) stage to limit the output to 4 results.

- [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to exclude all fields except `title`.

In the Aggregations tab of the `movies` collection,
configure each of the following pipeline stages by selecting the stage
from the dropdown and adding the query for that stage. Click
Add Stage to add additional stages.

| Pipeline Stage | Query                                                                                    |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| $search        | \{ "autocomplete": \{ "query": "Fast &", "path": "title", "tokenOrder": "sequential" } } |
| $limit         | 4                                                                                        |
| $project       | \{ "\_id": 0, "title": 1, }                                                              |

```json
{ title: 'Fast & Furious' },
{ title: 'Fast & Furious 6' }
```
